title: Commercial Spaces
excerpt: Galleries, flagship showrooms and private office interiors where the environment is as deliberate as the work it houses — spaces that say something before anyone speaks.

stats.label: Typical Timeline
stats.text: Months from briefing to final handover, depending on scale, fit-out complexity and any bespoke fabrication required.

stats.label: Best Suited For
stats.text: Galleries, flagship showrooms and private office interiors where the environment must perform before anyone speaks.

stats.label: New Starts Per Year
stats.text: We keep commercial starts limited so every space receives the same depth of attention we apply to private residential commissions.

overviewTitle: How Spaces Become HomeFrom Vision To Atmosphere
overviewExcerpt: A full-envelope service. We compose the house as one atmosphere — circulation, millwork, upholstery, art and evening light — never an idea on paper, never decoration after the fact.
richTextHtml:
From first brief to handover we hold one continuous logic — planning, material direction and lighting shaped as a single atmosphere, then carried through procurement, joinery and final styling.

We keep commercial starts intentionally limited, so every project receives a single steward and close site attention until the space settles.

processSteps.title: Observation
processSteps.excerpt: Time on site before drawing — reading movement, daylight, and how the household occupies the plan.
processSteps.label: 1-2 Weeks

processSteps.title: Concept & Plan
processSteps.excerpt: Circulation, hierarchy, material tone, and emotional register — set before any single item is detailed.
processSteps.label: 3-5 Weeks

processSteps.title: Design Development
processSteps.excerpt: Layouts become elevations, materials are tested, and custom pieces are drawn before execution begins.
processSteps.label: 1-2 Weeks

processSteps.title: Build & Installation
processSteps.excerpt: We steward procurement, site review, placement, and post-handover edits until the rooms settle.
processSteps.label: Project Dependent

relatedWork.label: Lombardy, Italy.
relatedWork.title: Atelier Rive
relatedWork.text: A penthouse designed around sculpture, daylight, and tactile surfaces, with nearly every fixed element custom-built in the Milan atelier.

richTextTwoHtml:
Transforming A House Into A Settled Home.

A family residence with quiet grandeur and rooms that stay calm once everyday life arrives. We led the full envelope — plan, materials, lighting and procurement — under one continuous logic.

What The Brief Asked For

Quiet grandeur, almost no visual noise and custom storage throughout — rooms that would keep their calm long after move-in.

Project Snapshot

9 Months Total14 Custom PiecesWalnut + LimestoneFull Procurement

Client Outcome

"It does not feel finished in the decorative sense. It feels settled — exactly what we hoped for."

title: Heritage Restoration
excerpt: Landmark buildings brought quietly into the present — preserving what the century left behind while introducing modern comfort without apology.

stats.label: Typical Timeline
stats.text: Months from structural survey to final handover, reflecting the research, consent processes and craft time each heritage commission requires.

stats.label: Best Suited For
stats.text: Listed buildings, heritage properties and period interiors where the balance between preservation and modern comfort must be held precisely.

stats.label: New Starts Per Year
stats.text: Heritage commissions are limited to two per year to allow the sustained site presence and archival research each project demands.

overviewTitle: How Spaces Become HomeFrom Vision To Atmosphere
overviewExcerpt: A full-envelope service. We compose the house as one atmosphere — circulation, millwork, upholstery, art and evening light — never an idea on paper, never decoration after the fact.
richTextHtml:
From first brief to handover we hold one continuous logic — structural survey, material matching and modern comfort introduced without apology, carried through procurement and final restoration detailing.

We limit heritage starts carefully, so every landmark receives a single steward and sustained site presence through the most sensitive phases of work.

processSteps.label: Project Dependent

relatedWork.title: Casa Bellini

title: Hospitality Design
excerpt: Boutique hotels, members’ clubs and destination restaurants — atmospheres that hold a guest from the moment they step inside.

stats.label: Typical Timeline
stats.text: Months from briefing to opening, depending on venue scale, fit-out complexity and the volume of bespoke fabrication required.

stats.label: Best Suited For
stats.text: Boutique hotels, members clubs and destination restaurants where atmosphere must hold a guest from the moment they step inside.

stats.label: New Starts Per Year
stats.text: We keep hospitality starts limited annually to ensure every venue receives the full depth of material and spatial attention the brief demands.

title: Lighting Design
excerpt: Light is not decoration — it is the room's first material. We compose bespoke lighting schemes and commission fixtures that turn function into atmosphere.

stats.label: Typical Timeline
stats.text: Months from briefing to final installation, depending on scale, location and the amount of bespoke work required.

stats.label: Best Suited For
stats.text: Private villas, city apartments and penthouses where atmosphere matters as much as planning precision.

stats.label: New Starts Per Year
stats.text: We keep residential starts intentionally limited so every home receives a single steward and close site attention.

title: Spatial Concept & Furniture
excerpt: When existing pieces won't do — custom furniture and spatial interventions conceived in-house, built in our Milan atelier and designed to outlive every trend.

stats.label: Typical Timeline
stats.text: Months from briefing to final installation, depending on scale, complexity and the volume of bespoke pieces required.

stats.label: Best Suited For
stats.text: Private villas, penthouses and residences where off-the-shelf furniture cannot answer the spatial logic of the commission.

stats.label: New Starts Per Year
stats.text: We limit furniture commissions annually to ensure every piece receives full atelier attention from concept through fabrication.
